# User seeds (signup defaults)

JSON catalog loaded when a new user registers.

```
data/
  products_seed_pl.json
  products_seed_en.json
  recipes_seed_pl.json
  recipes_seed_en.json
```

**Generated by scraper pipeline step 6:**
```bash
cd scraper && python pipeline/dump_seeds.py
```

**Runtime loader:** `backend/app/services/catalog_seed_service.py` (FastAPI register / worker job).
